message: Node started: Implement the core logic to identify the hidden polyominoes. Given the set of possible polyomino shapes and the noisy feedback from the I/O handler, develop a strategy to minimize probing costs. This should involve a search or probabilistic model to estimate the most likely locations and orientations of the oil fields. The engine should decide which coordinates to query next based on information gain or cost-efficiency and finally output the most probable set of oil cells. Focus on handling the noise parameter provided in the initial input.
